title: Léon: The Professional
tmdbOverview: Léon, the top hit man in New York, has earned a rep as an effective "cleaner". But when his next-door neighbors are wiped out by a loose-cannon DEA agent, he becomes the unwilling custodian of 12-year-old Mathilda. Before long, Mathilda's thoughts turn to revenge, and she considers following in Léon's footsteps.
synopsis: Léon: The Professional (1994) is a crime, drama and action film from France. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.5 on IMDb. A standout of 1990s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
